title: Adipocyte associated glucocorticoid signaling regulates normal fibroblast function which is lost in inflammatory arthritis
author: Heather Faust
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These R files which contain the code used to perform RNA sequencing analyses generated in the manuscript entitled: "Adipocytes regulate fibroblast function, and their loss contributes to fibroblast dysfunction in inflammatory diseases."
steps_raw: These R files which contain the code used to perform RNA sequencing analyses generated in the manuscript entitled: "Adipocytes regulate fibroblast function, and their loss contributes to fibroblast dysfunction in inflammatory diseases."
